title: Bridge Essay: Near-death experiences in cardiac arrest survivors.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Visionary cosmologies — self-transcendence, mystical experience, numinous, awe, cosmic consciousness.

**Near-death experiences in cardiac arrest survivors.** — Prog Brain Res. PMID: 16186035. DOI: 10.1016/S0079-6123(05)50025-6. Near-death experiences (NDEs) have become the focus of much interest in the last 30 years or so. Such experiences can occur both when individuals are objectively near to death and also when they simply believe themselves to be. The experience typically involves anumber of different components including afeeling of peace and well-being, out-of-body experiences (OBEs), entering aregion of darkness, seeing abrilliant light, and entering another realm.
